entities.name: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE ASSISTANT
entities.description: A tool designed to help researchers and practitioners access, synthesize, and navigate agricultural knowledge using LLMs.

entities.name: LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
entities.description: AI models used to process and generate natural language to assist in knowledge retrieval and synthesis.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: The body of information, documents, and datasets related to agriculture that researchers need to access.

entities.name: NATURAL LANGUAGE
entities.description: The human-like language used by users to query documents and datasets.

entities.name: GENERATIVE AI TOOLS
entities.description: AI tools capable of generating content, intended for integration into research workflows.

entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: The global research partnership where generative AI tools are integrated into research workflows.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The international research organization where the Agricultural Knowledge Assistant probe was led.

entities.name: RESEARCH WORKFLOWS
entities.description: The systematic processes used in scientific research for evidence use and decision-making.
